scenarios.description: String overload delegates to Reader overload and invokes treeBuilder.parse with non-null html and baseUri
scenarios.precondition: Use a stub TreeBuilder whose parse(Reader, String, Parser) returns a mock Document; parser = new Parser(stubBuilder)
scenarios.expectedResult: returns the mock Document from stubBuilder.parse

scenarios.description: Reader overload invokes treeBuilder.parse with non-null Reader and baseUri
scenarios.precondition: Use a stub TreeBuilder whose parse(Reader, String, Parser) returns a stub Document; parser = new Parser(stubBuilder)
scenarios.expectedResult: returns the stub Document from stubBuilder.parse
pseudocode:
Reader reader = new StringReader("
ok
"); String baseUri = "base";

scenarios.description: String overload with null html throws NullPointerException at StringReader construction
scenarios.expectedResult: throws NullPointerException; no interactions with treeBuilder

scenarios.description: Reader overload with null Reader throws NullPointerException before parse
scenarios.expectedResult: throws NullPointerException; no interactions with treeBuilder

scenarios.description: String overload with null baseUri passes null to parse and stubBuilder.parse throws IllegalArgumentException
scenarios.precondition: Use a stub TreeBuilder whose parse(Reader, String, Parser) throws IllegalArgumentException on null baseUri; parser = new Parser(stubBuilder)
